issue.author: dianqk
issue.title: [MemCpyOpt] The store instruction should not be removed by DSE.

tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "e-p:32:32:32-i1:8:8-i8:8:8-i16:16:16-i32:32:32-i64:32:64-f32:32:32-f64:32:64-v64:64:64-v128:128:128-a0:0:64-f80:128:128"
target triple = "i686-apple-darwin9"

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nounwind willreturn memory(argmem: readwrite)
declare void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr noalias nocapture writeonly, ptr noalias nocapture readonly, i64, i1 immarg) #0

declare void @f(ptr)

define void @immut_param(ptr noalias align 4 %val) {
  %val1 = alloca i8, align 4
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr align 4 %val1, ptr align 4 %val, i64 1, i1 false)
  call void @f(ptr noalias nocapture readonly align 4 %val1)
  ret void
}

attributes #0 = { nocallback nofree nounwind willreturn memory(argmem: readwrite) }
